lens: Markets capped a rocky, holiday-shortened week as the Fed's hawkish surprise under new Chair Kevin Warsh collided with an interim US–Iran peace agreement. Stocks rebounded into Thursday's close on a chip-led comeback.

stories.headline: Warsh's first Fed meeting delivers a hawkish surprise
stories.why_it_matters: The FOMC held rates but sharply raised inflation forecasts, with half of members now penciling in a hike this year. The pivot from expected cuts to potential hikes resets financing assumptions across every live deal.
stories.suggested_action: Flag the shift to clients still modeling rate cuts into deal timelines — the financing math has changed.

stories.headline: Trump signs interim agreement to end the war with Iran
stories.why_it_matters: The interim deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz began unwinding the energy shock behind 2026's inflation surprise. Falling oil eases a major overhang on cross-border deal confidence.
stories.suggested_action: Reconnect with clients who shelved cross-border or energy-exposed processes during the conflict.

stories.headline: Goldman Sachs retains the global M&A volume crown into 2026
stories.why_it_matters: Goldman led Q1 2026 advisers by deal value, advising on roughly $267B of transactions and roles on the majority of the quarter's megadeals. Its franchise is the bellwether for where complex, large-cap diligence is concentrated.
stories.suggested_action: Anchor outreach around Goldman's megadeal pipeline — large-cap, multi-jurisdiction processes are the highest-complexity data room use case.

stories.headline: Houlihan Lokey leads all advisers by deal volume in Q1 2026
stories.why_it_matters: Houlihan worked on 76 transactions in the quarter — more than any other adviser by count. High deal velocity makes repeatable, template-based data room setup a direct margin lever for their teams.
stories.suggested_action: Pitch speed-to-launch and templated setup to Houlihan deal teams running back-to-back mid-market processes.

deal_clock.event: Ranked #1 adviser by deal volume (76 deals)

opportunities.headline: #1 adviser by deal value in Q1 2026 (~$267B)
opportunities.why_it_matters: Goldman holds roles on the majority of the quarter's megadeals — the most complex, multi-jurisdiction diligence processes in the market.
opportunities.outreach_idea: Anchor on megadeal complexity — multi-jurisdiction permissioning and audit trails at scale.

outreach_draft.subject: Supporting Goldman's megadeal pipeline
outreach_draft.body:
With Goldman leading the Street on deal value this year, the through-line is scale and complexity — exactly where data room setup either accelerates or slows a process.

We help teams manage multi-jurisdiction permissions and audit trails on the largest transactions without manual rework. Worth a brief conversation on your most complex live processes?

Best,
[Your Name]
Intralinks · SS&C Technologies

market_snapshot.macro_note: Stocks rebounded into Thursday's close on a chip-led comeback after the Fed's hawkish surprise. The 2-year yield spiked as markets repriced toward a 2026 hike. US bond markets closed Friday for Juneteenth.

talking_point.quote: The Fed just flipped the script from cuts to a possible hike — how are your clients rethinking financing on deals they expected to close later this year?
talking_point.use_with: Clients with live processes assuming a lower-rate close
talking_point.context: Thursday's hawkish repricing is the anchor of every financing conversation heading into the weekend.
